zh.Swine, East Riding of Yorkshire Unitary: 英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁斯文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Constable於大約1377年出生在英國越可爾福藍波洛時，她的父親Robert Constable V26歲，母親Margaret Skipwith19歲。她和Sir Robert Hilton Knt. Baron of Hilton至少有3個女兒。她去世於1432年8月8日在英國英格蘭享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁斯文。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Constable was born about 1377, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Constable V, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Skipwith, was 19. She had at least 3 daughters with Sir Robert Hilton Knt. Baron of Hilton. She died on 8 August 1432, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Swine, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Sir Robert Hilton Knt. Baron of Hilton. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1432, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Swine, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Constable родилась около 1377 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Constable V было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Skipwith, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Sir Robert Hilton Knt. Baron of Hilton. Она умерла 8 августа 1432 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности сваин, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
